title: EvidenceCapsule
description: A user-verified, structured record of a single patient-reported symptom experience. This schema describes what a person reported and how it affected their day — it is not a diagnosis, risk score, or clinical assessment, and no field in this schema represents a clinical judgment.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this evidence capsule (UUID).

reported_at.description: Timestamp when the user captured this experience.

source_text.description: The original free-text note the user provided, verbatim. Retained so the user can always see what generated the structured fields.

symptoms.description: Symptom(s) as described by the user, in their own words or lightly normalized (e.g. 'pelvic pain'). Not a coded diagnosis list.

severity.description: The user's own characterization of how intense the experience was.

duration.description: How long the experience lasted, in the user's own terms (e.g. '2 hours', 'all day'). Free text, not a clinical duration code.

functional_impact.description: What the user reported this experience prevented or disrupted in daily life (e.g. 'left work early').

sleep_hours.description: Self-reported hours of sleep associated with this entry, if mentioned.

cycle_context.description: Optional self-reported menstrual cycle context (e.g. 'day 3 of period'). Never inferred without the user stating it.

hormone_therapy_or_contraception_context.description: Optional self-reported hormone therapy or contraception context, if mentioned by the user.

wearable_context.description: Optional self-reported or user-supplied wearable data context (e.g. heart rate, temperature trend). Not automatically synced in the MVP.

ai_confidence.description: Overall model confidence in the extraction, prior to user review. Informational only — never used to auto-finalize a capsule.

needs_review.description: Field names the extraction model flagged as ambiguous or low-confidence, requiring explicit user attention before acceptance. Empty array means nothing was flagged (not the same as user-verified).

user_verified.description: True only after the user has explicitly reviewed and accepted every field. AI extraction alone never sets this to true.

consent_scope.description: List of field names this capsule's owner has currently consented to share with research (see consent-receipt.schema.json for the full consent record). Empty by default.

severity.description: User-selected severity band. Reflects the user's own rating, not a clinical triage level.
